title: iris variegata var. lurida
intro: Iris variegata var. lurida, also known as the Yellow Iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Iris variegata var. lurida can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
